## 1) Source Availability Status
- Direct extraction failed.
- Clone returned HTTP 403 with a GitHub DMCA takedown notice reference.
- No repository content was ingested.

## 2) Why This Matters for the Final Skill
- Any architecture or pattern claim from this source would be speculative.
- For a canonical skill, speculative content is worse than missing content because it introduces unverifiable rules.

## 3) Quality-Control Policy Applied
- This source is marked `blocked` rather than silently omitted.
- No inferred “best practices” were generated from title alone.
- The merge process should include a replacement source before final publication.

## 4) Recommended Replacement Protocol
1. Pick a currently accessible source focused on agent orchestration/design patterns.
2. Run the same deep-pass template used for `01`:
   - concrete examples
   - decision matrix
   - anti-pattern/remediation pairs
   - skill contract snippet
3. Append references and provenance notes.

## 5) Suggested Candidate Replacements
- A maintained agent-architecture repository with public docs and examples.
- A primary paper/tutorial source on agent workflows (planning, tool use, memory, evaluation).

## 6) Merge Guidance
- Keep this file in the folder as audit evidence.
- Mark `09` as “pending replacement source” in any combined synthesis output.
